'''dhoshavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oafish|oafish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oafish|oafish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhoshavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoshavithi|dhoshavithi]] || [[word:dhoshaviji|dhoshaviji]] || [[word:dhoshavishi|dhoshavishi]] || [[word:dhoshaviki|dhoshaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoshavuthuthu|dhoshavuthuthu]] || [[word:dhoshavujuju|dhoshavujuju]] || [[word:dhoshavushushu|dhoshavushushu]] || [[word:dhoshavukuku|dhoshavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoshavuthu|dhoshavuthu]] || [[word:dhoshavuju|dhoshavuju]] || [[word:dhoshavushu|dhoshavushu]] || [[word:dhoshavuku|dhoshavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoshavufthuf|dhoshavufthuf]] || [[word:dhoshavufjuf|dhoshavufjuf]] || [[word:dhoshavufshuf|dhoshavufshuf]] || [[word:dhoshavufkuf|dhoshavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoshavethe|dhoshavethe]] || [[word:dhoshaveje|dhoshaveje]] || [[word:dhoshaveshe|dhoshaveshe]] || [[word:dhoshaveke|dhoshaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoshavothotho|dhoshavothotho]] || [[word:dhoshavojojo|dhoshavojojo]] || [[word:dhoshavoshosho|dhoshavoshosho]] || [[word:dhoshavokoko|dhoshavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoshavotho|dhoshavotho]] || [[word:dhoshavojo|dhoshavojo]] || [[word:dhoshavosho|dhoshavosho]] || [[word:dhoshavoko|dhoshavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoshavofthof|dhoshavofthof]] || [[word:dhoshavofjof|dhoshavofjof]] || [[word:dhoshavofshof|dhoshavofshof]] || [[word:dhoshavofkof|dhoshavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŠthĂŠ|dhoshavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŠjĂŠ|dhoshavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŠshĂŠ|dhoshavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoshavĂŠkĂŠ|dhoshavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoshavathatha|dhoshavathatha]] || [[word:dhoshavajaja|dhoshavajaja]] || [[word:dhoshavashasha|dhoshavashasha]] || [[word:dhoshavakaka|dhoshavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoshavatha|dhoshavatha]] || [[word:dhoshavaja|dhoshavaja]] || [[word:dhoshavasha|dhoshavasha]] || [[word:dhoshavaka|dhoshavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoshavafthaf|dhoshavafthaf]] || [[word:dhoshavafjaf|dhoshavafjaf]] || [[word:dhoshavafshaf|dhoshavafshaf]] || [[word:dhoshavafkaf|dhoshavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhoshavasha|dhoshavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhoshavshĂ«sha|dhoshavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhoshavrosha|dhoshavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhoshavmusha|dhoshavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhoshavyasha|dhoshavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhoshavnkshĂ«sha|godhoshavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhoshavnkrosha|godhoshavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhoshavnkmusha|godhoshavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhoshavnkyasha|godhoshavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhoshashavasha|dhoshashavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhoshashavshĂ«sha|dhoshashavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhoshashavrosha|dhoshashavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhoshashavmusha|dhoshashavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhoshashavyasha|dhoshashavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhoshashavnkshĂ«sha|godhoshashavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhoshashavnkrosha|godhoshashavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhoshashavnkmusha|godhoshashavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhoshashavnkyasha|godhoshashavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dheshĂŠvasha|dheshĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dheshĂŠvshĂ«sha|dheshĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dheshĂŠvrosha|dheshĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dheshĂŠvmusha|dheshĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dheshĂŠvyasha|dheshĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godheshĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|godheshĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godheshĂŠvnkrosha|godheshĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godheshĂŠvnkmusha|godheshĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godheshĂŠvnkyasha|godheshĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhoshfavasha|dhoshfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhoshfavshĂ«sha|dhoshfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhoshfavrosha|dhoshfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhoshfavmusha|dhoshfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhoshfavyasha|dhoshfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhoshfavnkshĂ«sha|godhoshfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhoshfavnkrosha|godhoshfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhoshfavnkmusha|godhoshfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhoshfavnkyasha|godhoshfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
